reviewRating.ratingExplanation: Composite Calibrated Authority score (sum of six 0-2 dimensions). Breakdown — D1 Traceability & inspectability: 1; D2 Human authorship & accountability: 1; D3 Disclosure & labeling: 1; D4 Synthetic-identity / fabrication prohibition: 1; D5 Human validation in loop: 1; D6 Evidential-trust emphasis: 1.
